header.home_link: Return to the Paldle home page

page_meta.base_description: Paldle is the daily Palworld guessing game. Guess the Pal of the day in four modes: Classic, Description, Silhouette and Sound.

want_more.title: Want more?
want_more.description: Discover the other daily guessing games of the -dle family.

about.title: About Paldle
about.discover: Paldle is a free daily guessing game for Palworld fans. A new Pal is chosen every day — come back tomorrow for a fresh puzzle.
about.disclaimer: Paldle is a fan-made project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Pocketpair, Inc. Palworld and all related names and assets are the property of Pocketpair.

game_modes.title: Game modes
game_modes.description: Classic: guess the Pal from its attributes. Description: guess the Pal from its Paldeck entry. Silhouette: guess the Pal from its shape. Sound: guess the Pal from its cry.

dle_games.title: The -dle family
dle_games.description: Paldle is part of a family of daily guessing games. Find them all in the footer below.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.description: Paldle is free to play and always will be. We keep the data current as new Pals are added to the game.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.description: Paldle is inspired by Wordle and the many great community -dle games.

credit.title: Credits
credit.description: Pal data and artwork belong to Pocketpair, Inc. Made with love by the community.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We use privacy-friendly analytics. See our privacy policy for details.

about.thanks: Thanks for playing, and have fun catching them all!

page_meta.title: Classic
page_meta.description: Guess today's Palworld Pal from its element, rarity, size, work suitabilities and more.

explanation.title: Guess today's Pal
explanation.hint: Each guess reveals how its attributes compare to the mystery Pal.

share.text: I found the #Paldle Classic Pal #{id} in {tries} guesses!

errors.no_daily: No Pal is set for today yet — check back soon!

how_to.title: How to play — Classic
how_to.body:
Guess the mystery Pal of the day. Type any Pal's name — you have unlimited guesses.

After each guess, every column is coloured to show how your Pal compares to today's answer:

  • Green — exact match.
  • Orange — partial match (e.g. one of its two elements, or some of its work types, are shared).
  • Red — no match.

The columns are the Pal's Paldeck number, Element(s), Rarity, Size, Work suitabilities, Mount type and whether it's Nocturnal.

On the numbered columns (Paldeck No., Rarity, Size), an ↑ or ↓ arrow means the answer's value is higher or lower than your guess.

A brand-new Pal is chosen every day — come back tomorrow for the next one!

errors.no_daily: No Pal is set for today yet — check back soon!

how_to.title: How to play — Description
how_to.body:
Read the mystery Pal's Paldeck entry and work out who it is.

Its own name is hidden, so watch for the tell-tale details in the text.

Every wrong guess reveals one more clue — first its Element, then its Size, then its Mount type.

The full artwork is revealed when you find it. A new Pal is chosen every day.

errors.no_daily: No Pal is set for today yet — check back soon!

how_to.title: How to play — Silhouette
how_to.body:
Only the Pal's black silhouette is shown — guess which Pal it is from its shape alone.

Type any Pal's name; you have unlimited guesses.

The full-colour artwork is revealed the moment you find it. A new Pal is chosen every day.

sound.hint: Listen to the cry and guess the Pal.

errors.no_daily: No Pal is set for today yet — check back soon!

how_to.title: How to play — Sound
how_to.body:
Press play to hear the mystery Pal's cry, then guess which Pal makes it.

Replay the sound as many times as you like — you have unlimited guesses.

The Pal's artwork is revealed when you find it. A new Pal is chosen every day.
